Google._comment: OAuth Web client ID — the audience Google ID tokens are validated against. Set Google:WebClientId via GOOGLE__WEBCLIENTID (Secret Manager / env in prod). Not a secret, but kept out of source.

Esewa._comment: Sandbox defaults. In production override Esewa:SecretKey / Esewa:MerchantCode via ESEWA__SECRETKEY / ESEWA__MERCHANTCODE and point FormUrl/StatusUrl at the live endpoints.

Admin._comment: Bootstrap admin. Leave empty here; set Admin:Email and Admin:Password via ADMIN__EMAIL / ADMIN__PASSWORD (Secret Manager in prod, gitignored appsettings.Development.json locally). An admin is auto-created on startup if none exists.

Cors._comment: Origins of the admin web portal allowed to call the API. Override Cors:PortalOrigins:0 etc. in production with the deployed portal URL.

RateLimiting._comment: Brute-force protection on the auth endpoints (login/register/google): PermitLimit requests per client IP per WindowSeconds, then 429. Override in prod via RATELIMITING__AUTH__PERMITLIMIT.
